case_title: ARIA ROONEY VS. ARLENE KEEL et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY ARLENE KEEL IS GRANTED. THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENTS OF $50.00 ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH STARTING FEBRUARY 1, 2011 UNTIL MARCH 1, 2012, AMOUNT OF THE FINAL PAYMENT OF $36.63. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,875.00 FILED BY ROONEY, ARIA AS TO DEFENDANT KEEL, ARLENE BANKS, LISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS ON JUDGMENT (SC-220); FILED BY DEFENDANT BANKS, LISA
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT KEEL, ARLENE HEARING SET FOR JAN-19-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ARLENE KEEL, WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LISA BANKS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK:S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROONEY, ARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEEL, ARLENE $636.63 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $686.63, DEFENDANT LISA BANKS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT ARLENE KEEL WAIVED SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO RETURN OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT BECAUSE DEFENDANT DID NOT COMPLY WITH CAL.CIV.CODE 1950.5. THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT DID NOT ACT IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LISA BANKS BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-12-2010 AT 1:30PM.
